metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for onboarding onto and asking questions about Java and Node.js codebases.

plugins.name: ask-java-codebase
plugins.description: Answer focused questions about a Java codebase (Spring Boot, Quarkus, Micronaut, Jakarta EE, WebFlux, Lombok). Conversational, evidence-first Q&A.

plugins.name: ask-node-codebase
plugins.description: Answer focused questions about a Node.js codebase (Express, Fastify, NestJS, Hono, Next.js, tRPC, Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM, monorepos). Conversational, evidence-first Q&A.

plugins.name: onboard-java
plugins.description: Onboard a developer onto a Java codebase via a phased workflow that mines build, architecture, security, observability, CI/CD, and code quality, then produces a written report.

plugins.name: onboard-node
plugins.description: Onboard a developer onto a Node.js codebase via a phased workflow that mines build, architecture, security, observability, CI/CD, and code quality, then produces a written report.
